title: When you have diarrhea
license_notes: Use as public patient-education source support. Avoid verbatim copying into primitives unless reuse terms are confirmed for the exact content.
supports: Fluid replacement is central to diarrhea self-care.
Patients should seek care for dehydration, blood in stool, fever, severe abdominal pain, or prolonged symptoms.
Diet can advance gradually as symptoms improve.
